common.tagline: Smart safety for pets — starting in Dublin.

home.metaTitle: TALOA — Smart Safety for Pets in Dublin
home.metaDescription: TALOA gives your pet a smart safety tag. If they're ever lost, whoever finds them can reach you in seconds. Starting in Dublin.
home.title: TALOA
home.subtitle: Smart safety for pets — starting in Dublin.

tag.lostDescription: {name} is missing. If you found this pet, you can contact the owner right away through TALOA.
tag.profileDescription: {name}'s TALOA safety profile. Found this pet? Reach the owner here.
tag.notFoundBody: We couldn't find a TALOA tag with this code.
tag.inactiveBody: This tag isn't activated yet. Activate it to create your pet's digital safety ID.
tag.disabledBody: This TALOA tag has been disabled. If you found a pet, please contact us.

activate.metaDescription: Set up your pet's TALOA safety profile in two quick steps so anyone who finds them can reach you.
activate.notFoundBody: We couldn't find a TALOA tag with this code.
activate.alreadySetupTitle: This tag is already set up
activate.alreadySetupBody: This tag is not available for activation.
activate.title: Activate your tag
activate.phonePlaceholder: Phone (shown to whoever finds your pet)
activate.fillAll: Please fill all fields. Password needs at least 8 characters.
activate.gdpr: I agree to the processing of my data (GDPR).
activate.acceptGdpr: Please accept the privacy terms (GDPR) to continue.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your TALOA account.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Smart safety for your pet, starting in Dublin.
signup.name: Name
signup.gdpr: I agree to the processing of my data (GDPR).
signup.mustAcceptGdpr: You must accept the privacy terms (GDPR) to continue.

lost.metaDescFallback: {name} is missing. If you have seen {name}, please contact the owner.
lost.notFoundBody: We couldn't find a TALOA tag with this code.
lost.noLongerLostTitle: {name} is no longer marked as lost
lost.noLongerLostBody: Good news — this pet is not currently missing.

banner.title: This pet is lost
banner.body: {name} is missing. If you found this pet, please contact the owner right away.

found.areaPlaceholder: Where did you find this pet? (area)
found.shareLocationHelp: Share your current location to help the owner find their pet faster.
found.locationUnavailable: Location isn't available on this device.
found.locationError: Couldn't get your location. You can still send the report.

services.thanks: Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.
services.modalIntro: Tell us a bit about you and we'll help with {petName}.
services.name: Name

share.shareText: {petName} is missing. Please help share and bring {petName} home.

emergency.metaDescription: A directory of Dublin veterinary clinics, including 24-hour emergency care. Find a vet fast when your pet needs help.
emergency.title: Emergency vets
emergency.subtitle: Dublin veterinary directory.
emergency.disclaimer: TALOA provides this directory for information only. Always call the clinic to confirm availability and suitability for your pet's species. This is not veterinary advice.

ai.disclaimer: TALOA AI is not a vet. For emergencies, call a vet immediately.
ai.greeting2: Ask me about pet safety, lost & found, or finding a vet in Dublin.
